title: httpd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.4.63-4.0.1]
- Replace index.html with Oracle's index page oracle_index.html.

[2.4.63-4.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-125894 - mod_ssl: allow more fine grained SSL SNI vhost check
  to avoid unnecessary 421 errors after CVE-2025-23048 fix
full_text:
[2.4.63-4.0.1]
- Replace index.html with Oracle's index page oracle_index.html.

[2.4.63-4.2]
- Resolves: RHEL-125894 - mod_ssl: allow more fine grained SSL SNI vhost check
  to avoid unnecessary 421 errors after CVE-2025-23048 fix

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23296.html
